title: Boundary Promotion Requires Sanitization

checks.description: boundary schemas and edge adapter bindings declare mandatory promotion pipelines
checks.command: rta check --boundary-sanitization --root fixtures/golden/pass && rta check --pattern-specs --root fixtures/golden/pass && rta check --pattern-contracts --root fixtures/golden/pass && rta check --production --root fixtures/golden/pass

decision: External, persisted, protocol, connector, queue, file, SQL, MCP, CLI, model, and API data must be decoded, sanitized, normalized, authorized, translated, and logged before it can become internal domain input. Sanitization is strategy-specific boundary promotion, not a generic string cleanup step.
